name: topoclaw-desktop
description: TopoClaw - 与手机端打通的聊天客户端

scripts.setup:builtin: npm run setup:assistant && npm run setup:customer-service && npm run setup:python
scripts.build: npm run setup:assistant && npm run setup:customer-service && npm run setup:python && npm run round-icon && npm run licenses:generate && tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json && vite build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.cjs
scripts.build:win:nsis: npm run setup:assistant && npm run setup:customer-service && npm run setup:python && npm run round-icon && npm run licenses:generate && tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json && vite build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.cjs --win --x64 -c.win.target=nsis
scripts.build:win:zip: npm run setup:assistant && npm run setup:customer-service && npm run setup:python && npm run round-icon && npm run licenses:generate && tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json && vite build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.cjs --win --x64 -c.win.target=zip
scripts.build:win:all: npm run setup:assistant && npm run setup:customer-service && npm run setup:python && npm run round-icon && npm run licenses:generate && tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json && vite build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.cjs --win --x64 -c.win.target=nsis -c.win.target=zip
scripts.build:portable: npm run setup:assistant && npm run setup:customer-service && npm run setup:python && npm run round-icon && npm run licenses:generate && tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json && vite build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.cjs --win --x64 -c.win.target=portable
scripts.electron:dev: npm run round-icon && tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json && concurrently "vite" "wait-on http://localhost:5173 && electron ."
scripts.electron:build: npm run setup:assistant && npm run setup:customer-service && npm run setup:python && npm run round-icon && npm run licenses:generate && tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json && vite build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.cjs
scripts.postinstall: electron-rebuild -f -w @nut-tree-fork/nut-js node-pty 2>nul || echo node-pty rebuild skipped (install VS Build Tools if terminal needed)
